html:
Resource Utilisation Report

From : {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.from_date, "dd MMM yyyy") }}    To : {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.to_date, "dd MMM yyyy") }}
{% set data = frappe.db.sql(""" SELECT r.resource_name, r.resource_type, COUNT(DISTINCT e.name) AS times_used FROM `tabEvent Resource Allocation` era JOIN `tabResource` r ON r.name = era.resource JOIN `tabEvents` e ON e.name = era.parent WHERE Date(e.start_time) >= %(from_date)s AND Date(e.end_time) <= %(to_date)s GROUP BY r.name, r.resource_name, r.resource_type ORDER BY times_used DESC """, { "from_date": doc.from_date, "to_date": doc.to_date, }, as_dict=True) %} {% for row in data %} {% endfor %}
S.No Resource Name Resource Type Times Used
{{ loop.index }} {{ row.resource_name }} {{ row.resource_type }} {{ row.times_used }}
Total Resources : {{ data | length }}
name: Resource Utilisation
